title: Being, then experience — intentionality + mom's house, Jun 2022
html:
TL;DR

  • Three-part note from one sitting. Part 1 is a philosophical aphorism — "Need to be intentional with what you are looking for; clear picture of friends and partners and businesses." Plus the fish grows to tank proverb: "Fish will only grow to the size of its tank."
  • Part 2 is a mom-gift / mom-rescue list — headphones, recliner, "get mom house by the river," hiking shoes. The "house by the river" recurs verbatim in 2025 01 01 project 2025 and 2024 10 30 thoughts on my future — this 2022 entry is the earliest captured version.
  • Part 3 is an idea-list for portent businesses to help his mom: NFT agency, consultant, drive-through munchies/dispensary combo (later restated in 2024 12 28 ideas), YouTube Shorts material.
  • Plus a one-line nerdy aside: "Duplicates of carbon consciousness is like umbrella academy duplication time travel dilemma of seeing yourself, like back to the future???"

Key quotes

"Fish will only grow to the size of its tank."

"Get mom house by the river."

Why it matters in the graph

  • Origin point for Yahir's "buy mom a house by a beautiful river" goal — a load-bearing thread across 2025 01 01 project 2025, 2024 10 30 thoughts on my future, and the Memory context.
  • The drive-through munchies/dispensary combo is the same idea that resurfaces in 2022 09 13 drive thru weed cash flow and again in 2024 12 28 ideas — three independent occurrences = clear pattern of dormant business interest.
  • "Be intentional with what you're looking for" is the operative form of the asking the right question concept, applied to partners + businesses, not just questions.

Open questions

  • The "fish grows to size of its tank" line — heard or original? Worth tagging origin.
  • Did he ever execute on NFT agency during the 2022 NFT cycle?

Wikilinks
